flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Pacific University fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (63.7% → 55.1%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Pacific University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($50.1k → $56.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Pacific University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($50.1k → $56.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Pacific University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).
